Defendant Change of Plea to "Guilty" or "No Contest" - Acknowledgement and Advisement of Defendant Pleading Guilty or No Contest

15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/TEXT:DEFERD ENTRY OF JDGMNT; DEF ENTS GLTYPLEA & REFRD TO DIVERSN/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CPSS/ARBUCKLE/TWS/X: TERMS OFDEJ- IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT PICK UP ANY NEW CASES IN 18 MONTHS,HE WILL BE PERMITTED TO WITHDRAW GUILTY PLEA TO FELONY AND PLEAD NO  CONTEST TO A MISDEMEANOR,/OR/DISM3/CONTD: DEJ PROGRESS REPORT-STATUS/DOPU: DEFENDANT IN FEDERAL CUSTODY OR INCOMPLIANCE,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: APPEARING FOR THE PEOPLE IS ANDREW PEREZ, CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, WHO ISSUPERVISED BY ADA SAM BECKERMAN,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:12-17-21 (10), 02-01-22 (60)/ACM/CTORD: DEFENDANT MUST NOT POSSESS ANY BURGLARY TOOLS/SAORD/SA2: 255 3RD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/ /CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1,5 HOURS/
